CONTENT.Club career: Gregersen was brought to Molde from Clausenengen in 2012. In March 2015, Gregersen joined Kristiansund on loan for the 2015 season.16 February 2017, Gregersen signed a new contract with Molde, which would have kept him with the club until 2020.In February 2019, Gregersen joined Elfsborg on loan until the end of the 2019 season.On 31 August 2021, Gregersen left Molde to sign for Bordeaux.Gregersen joined Atlanta United of Major League Soccer on 11 January 2024.
CONTENT.External links: Stian Rode Gregersen at the FC Girondins de Bordeaux websiteStian Rode Gregersen – French league stats at Ligue 1 – also available in FrenchStian Rode Gregersen – FIFA competition record (archived)Stian Rode Gregersen – UEFA competition record (archive)
CONTENT.International career: Gregersen made his debut for the Norway national team on 27 March 2021 in a World Cup qualifier against Turkey.

SUMMARY: Stian Rode Gregersen (born 17 May 1995) is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a Centre back for Major League Soccer club Atlanta United and the Norway national team.
